# Allow legitimate search engines (Google, Bing, etc.)
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

# --- BLOCK MALICIOUS / AGGRESSIVE BOTS ---

# Ahrefs (often scrapes contact info aggressively)
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

# Majestic SEO
User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /

# Semrush
User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

# DotBot (aggressive scraper)
User-agent: DotBot
Disallow: /

# BLEXBot (scrapes emails for spam)
User-agent: BLEXBot
Disallow: /

# Generic Backlink Crawler
User-agent: BacklinkCrawler
Disallow: /

# ------------------------------------------

# Default setting for all other bots
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Keep the API block for safety
Disallow: /api/

# Sitemap URL
Sitemap: https://mercyconsulting.com/sitemap.xml
